rationale: Gov't Code §2306.048 governs stays of penalty enforcement during judicial review of board orders. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2306.048. STAY OF ENFORCEMENT OF PENALTY.
_note: The cited rule concerns enforcement of penalties by a board and judicial review procedures; it has no bearing on homestead exemption appraisal thresholds.
